name: Pinar Sut Mamulleri Sanayii A.S.
summary: Pinar S√É¬ºt Mamulleri Sanayii A.S., through its subsidiaries, engages in the processing, production, and sale of milk and dairy products in Turkey. It offers milk, butter, cheese, yoghurts, kefir, ayrans, creams, fruit juices and drinks, flavors, desserts, delicatessens, convenience foods, sea foods, bottled water, out-of-home consumption products, sauces, jam and honey, pudding, and powdered products under the Pinar brand name. The company also exports its products to 27 countries, including Saudi Arabia, the United Arab Emirates, Kuwait, Qatar, Iraq, TRNC, Azerbaijan, Russia, Brazil, the People's Republic of China, the United States, and other countries. The company was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey. Pinar S√É¬ºt Mam√É¬ºlleri Sanayii A.S. is a subsidiary of Yasar Holding A.S.
